posts.title: Startup Cash Flow Management
posts.summary: Startup Cash Flow Management: One of the most frequent bits of advice to new entrepreneurs is, “Remember, Cash Is King!” However, if you let those words dominate your startup thinking, chances are high that you will go bust sooner than you think! Many advisers stress the financial aspects of starting a business—and while I agree […] The post Startup Cash Flow Management appeared first on Venture Founders .
